overview: A Diwali fireworks/firecrackers sale catalogue website with product browsing, filtering by category (Sparklers, Rockets, Flower Pots, Ground Chakkar, Aerial Shots, Bombs), product detail pages with safety info, and a shopping cart.
features: Fireworks product catalogue with 12–15 products across 7 categories
Search, filter by category, and sort by price/name
Product detail pages with effect duration, safety rating, pack size
Shopping cart with quantity controls and persistent storage
Festive Diwali design with warm reds, golds, and oranges
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
